calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; CSR: Proceedings Not Reported. (Waived by plaintiff's counsel).

Sharron DK Williams appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance by defendant Joe Roy Danforth.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 23, 2015.
Declaration of Charlotte Strickland in Lieu of Testimony (CCP Section 98) was served on defendant and filed with the Clerk's Office of February 26, 2016.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 4, 2016.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Joe Roy Danforth as follows:

Principal - $9,175.97.
Costs - $281.00.

Total - $9,456.97.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
